items.headline: Lakers Send Ayton to Wizards in Major Offseason Shake-Up!
items.summary: The Los Angeles Lakers have reportedly traded center Deandre Ayton to the Washington Wizards in exchange for guard Jaden Hardy and two future second-round draft picks. This move comes shortly after the Lakers acquired Walker Kessler, signaling a significant roster overhaul.

items.headline: LeBron James in Free Agency, Considering All Options!
items.summary: All eyes remain on LeBron James as he navigates free agency, confirming he will not return to the Los Angeles Lakers for his 24th season. Several teams, including the Minnesota Timberwolves, are reportedly ramping up their pursuit of the superstar.

items.headline: Blazers Tag Deni Avdija 'Untouchable' Amidst Trade Buzz!
items.summary: The Portland Trail Blazers reportedly view Israeli forward Deni Avdija as an 'untouchable' asset in trade discussions, underscoring his importance to their long-term plans. Avdija had a standout 41-point performance in his postseason debut earlier this year and was close to making the 2026 All-Star team.

items.headline: Heat Edge Spurs in California Classic Thriller
Grizzlies vs. Thunder - Salt Lake City Summer League
Hawks vs. Jazz - Salt Lake City Summer League
Queta Lands Big Extension with Celtics
items.summary: Celtics' big man Neemias Queta inked a four-year, $56 million extension, rewarding his strong season where he averaged 10.2 points, 8.4 rebounds, and 1.7 assists in 76 games.

items.headline: Top Rookies Set for Summer League Debuts
items.summary: No. 3 overall pick Cameron Boozer (MEM) is slated to make his Summer League debut today against the OKC Thunder, alongside other top prospects like No. 2 pick Darryn Peterson (UTA) and top-10 selection Brayden Burries (MIL).

items.headline: Andre Drummond Joins Knicks on One-Year Deal
items.summary: Veteran center Andre Drummond has signed a one-year, $3.9 million deal with the New York Knicks, providing crucial frontcourt depth for the reigning champions after Mitchell Robinson's departure.

items.headline: Jazz Add Josh Okogie on Two-Year Contract
items.summary: The Utah Jazz have secured guard Josh Okogie on a two-year, $12 million deal, adding a defensive presence and veteran experience to their roster.

items.headline: Rockets Trade Dorian Finney-Smith to Hornets
items.summary: The Houston Rockets have traded forward Dorian Finney-Smith along with three second-round picks to the Charlotte Hornets, as the Hornets continue to amass draft capital.

items.headline: Wizards' Alex Sarr Recovering from Foot Surgery
items.summary: Wizards rookie Alex Sarr is currently recovering from a fractured right foot, creating uncertainty around the team's center rotation as they look to integrate new acquisition Deandre Ayton.
